subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-09-15
subcodes.first_line: I rejoice exceedingly at meeting you and render thanksgiving unto God that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: من از ملاقات شما خیلی مسرورم شکر می کنم خدارا که
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @unity; oneness of humanity, @East and West; communication between East and West, @martyrs and martyrdom, @Christ; Christianity
